title: The 'Three Peaks' Faecal DNA Extraction Method for Long-Read Sequencing
author: Josh Quick
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7rshm6e

steps.title: Add 100 mg fresh stool or...
steps.instruction: Add 100 mg fresh stool or 50 µL OMNIgene GUT to 200 µL DNA/RNA Shield, vortex briefly and place on a tube rotator for 00:10:00 at 20 rpm . OMNIgene•GUT DNA Genotek Catalog #OMR-200 DNA/RNA Shield Zymo Research Catalog #R1100-50

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 x g for 00:05:00 and retain up to 200 µL supernatant depending on size of pellet.

steps.title: Add 100 µL PBS and resuspend...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL PBS and resuspend material by pipetting up and down, centrifuge at 5000 x g 00:05:00 and retain up to 100 µL supernatant depending on size of pellet.

steps.title: Add 1 mL PBS and resuspend...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL PBS and resuspend material by pipetting up and down, centrifuge at 5000 x g for 00:05:00 and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Add 100 µL PBS and 5...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL PBS and 5 µL MetaPolyzyme, mix by pipetting and incubate at 35 °C for 02:00:00 . Gently mix by pipetting up and down to ensure solution is homogeneous before proceeding. MetaPolyzyme Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #MAC4L-5MG

steps.title: Add 100 µL DNA/RNA Shield, 10...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL DNA/RNA Shield, 10 µL 10 % (w/v) SDS and 10 µL 20 mg/mL Proteinase K and mix by pipetting. Incubate at 55 °C for 00:30:00 with 300 rpm mixing. Gently mix by pipetting up and down to ensure solution is homogeneous before proceeding.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 x g for 00:05:00 and retain up to 200 µL supernatant depending on size of pellet.

steps.title: Resuspend pellet in 750 µL Lysis...
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellet in 750 µL Lysis Solution and transfer to a ZR BashingBead Lysis Tube. Bead-beat on a FastPrep instrument for 1 cycle of 00:00:40 at 6 m/s FastPrep-24 5G (Bead-beater, MP Biomedicals, 116005500, https://uk.mpbio.com/fastprep-24-5g-instrument , https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/public/39d9677dde602e4eb59e1a2a80692deb0a16d60c7dc1af5eefdc42b950e8922e/bnxwia8e.jpg )

steps.title: Centrifuge tube at 10000 x g...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tube at 10000 x g for 00:01:00 and retain 400 µL supernatant.

steps.title: Pool the supernatants retained at each...
steps.instruction: Pool the supernatants retained at each of the steps in a 2 ml Eppendorf tube and measure the volume using a P1000 pipette.

steps.title: Add 2 volumes of Genomic Lysis...
steps.instruction: Add 2 volumes of Genomic Lysis Buffer and 50 µL MagBinding beads and place on a tube rotator for 00:10:00 at 20 rpm .

steps.title: Put tube on a magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Put tube on a magnetic rack and incubate for 00:02:00 or until clear. Discard supernatant taking care not to disturb bead pellet.

steps.title: Remove from the magnetic rack and...
steps.instruction: Remove from the magnetic rack and using a P1000 pipette add 100 µL DNA elution buffer. Mix by pipetting up and down x10.

steps.title: Add 500 µL Quick-DNA MagBinding Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Quick-DNA MagBinding Buffer and place on a tube rotator for 00:10:00 at 20 rpm .

steps.title: Put tube on a magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Put tube on a magnetic rack and incubate for 00:02:00 or until clear. Discard supernatant taking care not to disturb bead pellet.

steps.title: Remove from the magnetic rack and...
steps.instruction: Remove from the magnetic rack and using a P1000 pipette add 900 µL DNA Pre-Wash Buffer. Mix by pipetting up and down x10 and transfer to a new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Put tube on a magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Put tube on a magnetic rack and incubate for 00:02:00 or until clear. Discard supernatant taking care not to disturb bead pellet.

steps.title: Remove from the magnetic rack and...
steps.instruction: Remove from the magnetic rack and using a P1000 pipette add 900 µL g-DNA Wash Buffer. Mix by pipetting up and down x10 and transfer to a new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Put tube on a magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Put tube on a magnetic rack and incubate for 00:02:00 or until clear. Discard supernatant taking care not to disturb bead pellet.

steps.title: go to step #18 and repeat...
steps.instruction: go to step #18 and repeat wash with g-DNA Wash Buffer for a second time.

steps.title: Using a P1000 wide-bore pipette tip...
steps.instruction: Using a P1000 wide-bore pipette tip to reduce turbulence add 900 µL DNA elution buffer to the front of the tube and immediately remove it again. Try to do this in a fast, smooth motion disturbing the beads as little as possible.

steps.title: Remove the residual buffer from the...
steps.instruction: Remove the residual buffer from the bottom of the tube and discard.

steps.title: With a P1000 pipette add 50...
steps.instruction: With a P1000 pipette add 50 µL DNA elution buffer to the tube and mix by pipetting up and down x10.

steps.title: Place on a tube rotator for 00:05:00 at 20 rpm
steps.instruction: Place on a tube rotator for 00:05:00 at 20 rpm .

steps.title: Put tube on a magnetic rack...
steps.instruction: Put tube on a magnetic rack and incubate for 00:02:00 or until clear. Transfer DNA to a new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tube. Store DNA at 5 °C for up to a month or use immediately.
